releaseDateAndWishlist.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Release Date
releaseDateAndWishlist.subtitle: Check the official Chapter 3 release status, Roblox availability and wishlist information from Roy & Charcle.
releaseDateAndWishlist.intro: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 does not currently have an announced release date or an official wishlist page. The only official Roblox experience is Rainbow Friends published by the Roy & Charcle community.

items.label: Release Date
items.description: Roy & Charcle have not published a release date for Rainbow Friends Chapter 3.

items.label: Release Window
items.description: No official month, season or year has been assigned to Chapter 3.

items.label: Wishlist Status
items.description: There is currently no Chapter 3 wishlist page connected to the official Roblox experience or developer accounts.

items.label: Platform
items.description: Rainbow Friends is available through Roblox on platforms supported by the Roblox application.

items.label: Official Experience
items.description: The official game is published by Roy & Charcle and uses Roblox place ID 7991339063.

items.label: Playable Chapters
items.description: The current experience contains two playable chapters, each divided into five objective-based stages.

items.label: Chapter 3 Games on Roblox
items.description: Chapter 3 games published by creators other than Roy & Charcle are not part of the official Rainbow Friends release.

items.label: Fake Release Dates
items.description: Several widely shared Chapter 3 release dates are fan-made and are not Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 announcements.

codes.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Codes
codes.subtitle: View the current code status and the official places where future Rainbow Friends rewards may be announced.
codes.intro: Rainbow Friends does not currently provide a public code redemption system. Roy & Charcle have not released any working or expired Chapter 3 codes.

items.description: There are no official Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 codes available to redeem.
Roy & Charcle have not published a previous set of Chapter 3 promotional codes.
The official Rainbow Friends experience does not currently include a public code entry menu.
Future code features or rewards would be announced through the official Roblox experience, community or developer social account.

beginnerGuide.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the core teamwork, objective collection, hiding and survival skills used throughout the official Rainbow Friends experience.
beginnerGuide.intro: Rainbow Friends is a cooperative horror game in which players complete collection tasks while avoiding monsters. These fundamentals from the live chapters provide the essential preparation for the next official chapter.

steps.title: Join the Official Experience
steps.description: Open Rainbow Friends by Roy & Charcle using Roblox place ID 7991339063. Avoid similarly named Chapter 3 experiences published by unrelated creators.
steps.tip: Confirm that the creator shown beneath the game title is Roy & Charcle.

steps.title: Read the Current Objective
steps.description: Each stage gives the group a collection or delivery task. Check the required item and remaining total before leaving the starting area.
steps.tip: Search a different section of the map when several teammates are already following the same route.

steps.title: Collect and Return Items
steps.description: Pick up objective items found around the map and carry them back to the required collection point. The game allows players to carry multiple discovered items.
steps.tip: Return valuable items when a safe route is available instead of holding everything until the end.

steps.title: Use Your Box Carefully
steps.description: Cardboard boxes and other hiding props can conceal players when monsters are nearby, but hiding does not stop every enemy or every attack.
steps.tip: Create distance before hiding and be ready to move when a monster continues approaching.

steps.title: Learn Each Monster's Rule
steps.description: Blue can follow players through normal doors, Green has long reach, Orange is extremely fast and Purple attacks near vents. Chapter 2 also adds Yellow, which carries players away, and Cyan, which can pursue players around obstacles.
steps.tip: Watch the environment and listen for movement before entering narrow corridors.

steps.title: Stay Useful to the Team
steps.description: Split up enough to cover the map, but keep track of nearby teammates and completed routes. A coordinated group finishes objectives faster and spends less time exposed to monsters.
steps.tip: Do not lead a pursuing monster toward teammates working at the item drop-off point.

walkthrough.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Walkthrough
walkthrough.subtitle: Follow the current official game route and see which Chapter 3 objectives, puzzles and checkpoints are available.
walkthrough.intro: Chapter 3 is not currently playable in the official Rainbow Friends experience, so no official Chapter 3 objective route has been published. The live game currently contains Chapter 1 and Chapter 2, with five stages in each chapter.

steps.title: Chapter 3 Starting Area
steps.description: No official Chapter 3 starting area, map entrance or chapter-selection option is currently available.

steps.title: Objectives and Required Items
steps.description: Chapter 3 item names, collection totals, delivery points and puzzle requirements have not been added to the official experience.

steps.title: Map and Safe Routes
steps.description: No official Chapter 3 map layout, checkpoint list, hiding route or safe path has been published.

steps.title: Monster Encounters
steps.description: The confirmed live roster across the first two chapters includes Blue, Green, Orange, Purple, Yellow and Cyan. Chapter 3 encounter rules are not currently part of the game.

steps.title: Current Playable Structure
steps.description: Chapter 1 uses five Nights and Chapter 2 uses five Hours. Players complete group objectives, avoid the Rainbow Friends and reach the chapter escape sequence.

steps.title: Official Chapter 3 Route
steps.description: The complete route will begin with the official Roblox update and will cover every objective, puzzle, required item, checkpoint, chase and ending in order.

monsterTierList.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Monster Tier List
monsterTierList.subtitle: Compare the Chapter 3 lineup by chase pressure, detection style, warning cues and safest response.
monsterTierList.intro: This preparation tier list ranks the characters named in the Chapter 3 reveal material. The escape advice uses their established in-game behavior from the released Rainbow Friends chapters.

items.name: Orange
items.warningSigns: An alarm cue and a glowing orange path announce the run.
items.behavior: Orange crosses the map at high speed along a marked route and punishes players who remain in the lane.
items.counterStrategy: Step completely off the orange trail, wait for the run to finish and cross only after the route is clear.

items.name: Green
items.warningSigns: Loud squeaking footsteps and long arms entering a corridor.
items.behavior: Green cannot see players, but direct contact is lethal and a box does not protect a player who walks into his reach.
items.counterStrategy: Keep a wide gap, stop at corners to listen and use another route instead of squeezing past his arms.

items.name: Blue
items.warningSigns: Heavy footsteps, vocal sounds and Blue entering the same route.
items.behavior: Blue patrols open routes and chases exposed players. A properly timed box hide breaks most standard pursuits.
items.counterStrategy: Break line of sight, box before Blue reaches close range and leave the box only after his footsteps move away.

items.name: Purple
items.detection: Designated vents, lairs and environmental traps
items.warningSigns: Visible eyes, hands or an active hazard area around Purple's position.
items.behavior: Purple controls specific parts of the map instead of running a normal patrol route.
items.counterStrategy: Follow the safe edge of the marked route, avoid the active ambush space and never cut directly through Purple's zone.

items.name: Red
items.detection: Story events, traps and controlled encounters
items.warningSigns: Cutscenes, changed objectives, blocked exits and newly activated machinery.
items.behavior: Red drives the story and creates dangerous situations rather than using the regular patrol behavior of the other Friends.
items.counterStrategy: Read the objective prompt, inspect changed routes and expect the next hazard to begin after Red appears.

mapAndLocations.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Map and Locations
mapAndLocations.subtitle: Explore the Pirate Ship, the Sea map and the Chapter 3 routes connected to Odd World.
mapAndLocations.intro: Chapter 3 shifts the escape into a maritime branch of Odd World centered on a pirate ship and a dark Sea map. These location cards organize the major spaces shown across the teaser, trailer and soundtrack material.

items.name: The Pirate Ship
items.features: A large ship environment that combines exposed exterior routes with enclosed interior passages.
items.routeUse: Treat the ship as the central navigation hub and learn every doorway, stair connection and return path.
items.survivalTip: Keep one open retreat route before entering a narrow section, especially when Blue or Green is nearby.

items.name: Sea Map
items.features: Dark water, low-visibility atmosphere and the tense setting represented by the official Sea soundtrack.
items.routeUse: Use large ship structures and fixed lights as landmarks instead of relying on similar-looking water-side paths.
items.survivalTip: Avoid stopping beside dead ends and keep enough space to move away from a marked chase route.

items.name: Upper Deck Routes
items.features: Wide sightlines, exposed crossings and multiple approaches around the ship exterior.
items.routeUse: Use open visibility to spot Blue or an Orange route early, then move toward the nearest interior connection.
items.survivalTip: Cross exposed deck space quickly and do not box in the middle of a marked sprint lane.

items.name: Ship Interior
items.features: Tight corridors, connected rooms, blind corners and short escape loops inside the Pirate Ship.
items.routeUse: Memorize one loop that returns to a larger room and note which corners are too narrow for passing Green.
items.survivalTip: Listen before turning a corner and avoid entering a room that has only one usable exit.

items.name: Odd World Connection
items.features: The reveal returns players to Odd World while moving the story from the Chapter 2 escape toward the ship and sea.
items.routeUse: Use signs, themed landmarks and objective markers to track how each ship area connects back into the larger Odd World setting.
items.survivalTip: Remember the last safe landmark after every objective so a chase does not force you deeper into an unfamiliar branch.

storyAndEnding.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Story and Ending
storyAndEnding.subtitle: Follow the story from the original field trip through the Odd World escape and into the Pirate Ship chapter.
storyAndEnding.intro: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 continues the same escape story rather than starting a separate adventure. The current story path connects the Chapter 2 finale to a darker return to Odd World, a Pirate Ship setting and the mystery of the Missing Colors.

items.title: The Field Trip Is Diverted
items.summary: A normal trip toward Odd World is sabotaged when the road sign is changed. The bus crashes and the players are taken into the Rainbow Friends facility.

items.title: The Players Escape the Facility
items.summary: The survivors complete Red's collection tasks, avoid the original Rainbow Friends and reach an escape route that carries the story toward Odd World.

items.title: Odd World Opens
items.summary: The next chapter expands the story into the abandoned Odd World attraction. Yellow and Cyan join the active threats while the group completes new collection and repair objectives.

items.title: The Minecart Escape and Cyan Chase
items.summary: The finale moves through the ride system in a fast minecart sequence. Cyan becomes the final close-range threat as the survivors push out of the attraction.

items.title: The Escape Reaches the Pirate Ship
items.summary: Chapter 3 returns to Odd World with a darker maritime setting. The Pirate Ship and Sea map become the next stage of the escape while Blue, Green, Red, Orange and Purple return in the reveal material.

items.title: The Missing Colors
items.summary: The Missing Colors is presented as a central Chapter 3 mystery tied to the new setting and the returning Rainbow Friends. The public trailer set establishes the mystery and stops before showing the complete playable ending.

updatesAndNews.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 Updates and News
updatesAndNews.subtitle: Follow the official reveal campaign, Pirate Ship previews, soundtrack releases and Roblox updates in one place.
updatesAndNews.intro: This feed organizes the Chapter 3 campaign from the first teaser material through the Pirate Ship reveal and wishlist announcement. Each update points to Roy & Charcle's official video, Roblox or social channels.

items.title: Rainbow Friends: Chapter 3 Official Teaser Trailer
items.summary: The teaser brings the Rainbow Friends back to a darker version of Odd World and begins the Chapter 3 reveal campaign.

items.title: The Pirate Ship Teaser
items.summary: The next trailer identifies the Pirate Ship as the defining Chapter 3 setting and places the new escape route around a maritime environment.

items.title: Rainbow Friends: Chapter 3 Final Official Trailer
items.summary: The expanded trailer presents the darker Odd World tone, the returning Rainbow Friends and additional Pirate Ship story imagery.

items.title: The Pirate Ship - Sea Official OST
items.summary: The official Sea track establishes the tense underwater and maritime atmosphere used for the Chapter 3 map.

items.title: Chapter 3 Official Reveal Trailer - Wishlist Now
items.summary: The reveal names Blue, Green, Red, Orange and Purple in the Chapter 3 lineup and directs players to the official wishlist page.

items.title: Roy & Charcle Official Updates
items.summary: New launch information, Roblox changes, trailers and post-release notices are published through the official Roy & Charcle channel network.

faq.title: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3
faq.subtitle: The key questions players ask about the Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 release, official channels and current game status.

questions.question: Is Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 officially released?
questions.answer: No. Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 is not officially released yet. The only official game is Rainbow Friends by Roy & Charcle, which currently contains Chapter 1 and Chapter 2.

questions.question: What is the Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 release date?
questions.answer: There is no official Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 release date. Roy & Charcle have not announced a month, season or year, so any specific date shared online is fan-made.

questions.question: Which chapters can I play in Rainbow Friends right now?
questions.answer: You can play Chapter 1 and Chapter 2 inside the official Rainbow Friends experience by Roy & Charcle. Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 is not part of the live game yet.

questions.question: Are the Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 trailers I see on YouTube official?
questions.answer: Some Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 trailers come from Roy & Charcle, while many others are fan-made. Always check that the channel is the official Roy & Charcle account before treating a trailer as real.

questions.question: Where can I play Rainbow Friends Chapter 3?
questions.answer: Rainbow Friends is available on Roblox using place ID 7991339063. Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 will be added to the same official experience when Roy & Charcle release it.

questions.question: Who develops Rainbow Friends Chapter 3?
questions.answer: Rainbow Friends Chapter 3 is developed by Roy & Charcle. The official Roblox game, community, website and social accounts are the only confirmed sources for Chapter 3 news.
